## Summary

<!-- Describe what changed and why. -->

## Project Type

- [ ] Web admin / business app (`GitHub + Vercel`, add `Figma` when needed)
- [ ] Edge API / realtime backend (`GitHub + Cloudflare`, optional `Vercel` frontend)
- [ ] AI SaaS (`GitHub + Vercel + Hugging Face`, optional `Cloudflare`)
- [ ] Design-driven product (`GitHub + Figma + Vercel`, optional `Cloudflare`)

## Quality Gate Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:unit` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Optional: e2e checks pass (required for critical projects)

## Review and Merge Rules

- [ ] At least one reviewer approval is obtained
- [ ] All blocking comments are resolved
- [ ] CI checks are green before merge

## Environment and Rollback

- [ ] PR preview is available for verification
- [ ] Change is tested in staging before production
- [ ] Rollback plan is confirmed (platform rollback + stable tag)
